title: Property Consultant - Nexus Malls - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Nexus Malls - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kolkata operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!
